app.title: Fate 0:00
app.exitMessage: The wheels of fate keep turning...

home.starsResting: The stars have already spoken to you today. See you tomorrow.
home.starsRestingDetail: The stars are resting. They will awaken again tomorrow.

tarot.title: Tarot Cards
tarot.prepareDesc: Begin with a calm mind. Take a deep breath and clear your thoughts. Tarot is not a tool for predicting the future, but a psychological guide that reads current energy and helps you make better choices.
tarot.questionGuide: The more specific your question, the clearer the answer.
tarot.questionPlaceholder: Write what you'd like to ask the cards...
tarot.shuffleDesc: Repeat your question in your mind as you shuffle the cards.
tarot.cutDesc: Split the deck with your left hand and reassemble it. Your energy flows into the cards.
tarot.flipGuide: Feel your first impression as you tap each card.
tarot.adviceMessage: This card offers advice to guide your current situation in a better direction. Tarot shows the energy of the present, not a fixed future. The choice is always yours.
tarot.summary3: Read the flow connecting past, present, and future, and respond wisely.

horoscope.title: Horoscope
horoscope.resonanceAligned: Perfect alignment. The sealed gates of perception swing open.
horoscope.resonanceApproaching: The satellite of memory (Moon) is entering your nebula.
horoscope.resonanceNeutral: The moon watches you from a distant orbit. A time of quiet observation.
horoscope.resonanceDistant: Silence drifts between moon and stars. Time to listen to your inner voice.

saju.title: Four Pillars
saju.prompt: Enter your date and time of birth
saju.inputDesc: Enter the temporal coordinates of your moment of birth
saju.step1Desc: Eight unique ciphers extracted from the celestial almanac — your unchanging innate blueprint
saju.landscapeQuote: The Four Pillars is not about finding perfect balance, but about seeing what overflows and what is lacking. This imbalance is at once life's deficit and the driving force behind intense desire.
saju.step4Desc: The cosmic seasons that shift every decade — your timeline
saju.daeunQuote: Over the unchanging eight characters, a new energy called the Great Cycle crashes down. Clash is both crisis and the spark of transformation; Harmony is a season of growth.

omikuji.title: Omikuji
omikuji.prompt: Shake the box to draw your fortune
omikuji.purifyDesc: Wash away the noise of the mundane world and reset your spiritual senses.
omikuji.prayRitual: Two Bows, Two Claps, One Bow
omikuji.clapDesc: The sound of clapping cuts through silence — an acoustic trigger that announces your presence to the divine realm.
omikuji.questionDesc: This question becomes the cipher key for interpreting the text you are about to draw.
omikuji.questionPlaceholder: The one question you wish to ask the gods...
omikuji.connectionDone: Connection with the divine has been established...
omikuji.shakeStep: Stage 2 — Extracting the Thread of Fate
omikuji.shakeDesc: Countless possible futures swirl inside the box. Shaking is the act of filtering out the timeline that resonates most strongly with your energy.
omikuji.extracting: Extracting coordinates that resonate with your energy...
omikuji.wakaDesc: The waka is a highly compressed metaphorical text channeling divine counsel. Project the verses onto your question and interpret for yourself.
omikuji.fatePrompt: What will you do with this text of fate?
omikuji.keepDesc: Carry it with you in your wallet
omikuji.tieDesc: Tie it to the pine tree
omikuji.keepMessage: A narrative of good fortune has been saved to your inventory. This fortune will serve as a talisman to watch over you.
omikuji.tieMessage: In Japanese tradition, the pine tree (matsu) is a homophone for 'to wait' (matsu). Tying a bad fortune to the pine delays the unfolding of an unfavorable scenario, allowing the wind, rain, and the shrine's spiritual energy to gradually purify the negative data.

profile.title: Tell us about yourself
profile.subtitle: Enter your info for more accurate readings
profile.name: Name

privacy.notice:
Welcome, dear visitor.
Share your name and birthday, and the stars will reveal their story for you.
privacy.detail: Rest assured — what you share stays here, on this device alone, and can be erased whenever you wish.

dailyLimit.resetAt: You can read again at midnight

reverseFate.title: Defy Fate
reverseFate.subtitle: Reverse your fate
reverseFate.ritual: Those who endure the trial shall receive a new destiny
